form.label: Interruptions prévues
form.description: Surveillance des interruptions de service planifiées au Québec

search.query: index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:interruption_planifie | stats latest(aip_timestamp) as derniere_collecte by region | where derniere_collecte > relative_time(now(), "-2h") | table region | sort region

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:interruption_planifie region="$region_filter$" | stats latest(aip_timestamp) as derniere_collecte by municipalite | where derniere_collecte > relative_time(now(), "-2h") | table municipalite | sort municipalite

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:interruption_planifie region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | stats latest(aip_timestamp) as derniere_collecte, latest(date_debut_prevue) as debut by id_interruption | where derniere_collecte > relative_time(now(), "-2h") | eval debut_timestamp = strptime(debut, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | where debut_timestamp > now() | stats count

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:interruption_planifie region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | stats latest(aip_timestamp) as derniere_collecte, latest(nombre_clients) as clients, latest(date_debut_prevue) as debut by id_interruption | where derniere_collecte > relative_time(now(), "-2h") | eval debut_timestamp = strptime(debut, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | where debut_timestamp > now() | stats sum(clients) as total_clients

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:interruption_planifie region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | stats latest(aip_timestamp) as derniere_collecte, latest(date_debut_prevue) as debut by id_interruption | where derniere_collecte > relative_time(now(), "-2h") | eval debut_timestamp = strptime(debut, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | where debut_timestamp > now() AND debut_timestamp < (now() + 86400) | stats count

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:interruption_planifie region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | stats latest(aip_timestamp) as derniere_collecte, latest(date_debut_prevue) as debut, latest(date_fin_prevue) as fin by id_interruption | where derniere_collecte > relative_time(now(), "-2h") | eval debut_timestamp = strptime(debut, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval fin_timestamp = strptime(fin, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | where debut_timestamp < now() AND fin_timestamp > now() | stats count

panel.title: Interruptions par jour à venir (prochains 14 jours)

search.query: index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:interruption_planifie region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | stats latest(aip_timestamp) as derniere_collecte, latest(date_debut_prevue) as debut by id_interruption | where derniere_collecte > relative_time(now(), "-2h") | eval debut_timestamp = strptime(debut, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | where debut_timestamp > now() AND debut_timestamp < (now() + (86400 * 14)) | eval jour = strftime(debut_timestamp, "%Y-%m-%d") | stats count as interruptions by jour | sort jour

panel.title: Clients affectés à venir par Jour

search.query: index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:interruption_planifie region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | stats latest(aip_timestamp) as derniere_collecte, latest(date_debut_prevue) as debut, latest(nombre_clients) as clients by id_interruption | where derniere_collecte > relative_time(now(), "-2h") | eval debut_timestamp = strptime(debut, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | where debut_timestamp > now() AND debut_timestamp < (now() + (86400 * 14)) | eval jour = strftime(debut_timestamp, "%Y-%m-%d") | stats sum(clients) as total_clients by jour | sort jour

panel.title: Top 5 - Régions avec plus d'interruptions prévues

search.query: index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:interruption_planifie region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" [search index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:interruption_planifie | stats latest(aip_id) as aip_id | return aip_id] | dedup id_interruption | eval debut_timestamp = strptime(date_debut_prevue, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | where debut_timestamp > now() | stats count as interruptions by region | sort - interruptions | head 5 | rename region as "Région", interruptions as "Interruptions"

panel.title: Top 5 - Municipalités avec plus d'interruptions prévues

search.query: index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:interruption_planifie region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | stats latest(aip_timestamp) as derniere_collecte, latest(date_debut_prevue) as debut by id_interruption, municipalite | where derniere_collecte > relative_time(now(), "-2h") | eval debut_timestamp = strptime(debut, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | where debut_timestamp > now() | stats count as interruptions by municipalite | sort - interruptions | head 5

index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:interruption_planifie region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | stats latest(aip_timestamp) as derniere_collecte, latest(municipalite) as municipalite, latest(adresse) as adresse, latest(nombre_clients) as clients, latest(date_debut_prevue) as debut_prevu, latest(date_fin_prevue) as fin_prevue, latest(cause_desc) as cause, latest(statut) as statut, latest(latitude) as lat, latest(longitude) as lon by id_interruption | where derniere_collecte > relative_time(now(), "-2h") | eval debut_timestamp = strptime(debut_prevu, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval fin_timestamp = strptime(fin_prevue, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | where debut_timestamp > now() AND debut_timestamp < (now() + (86400 * 2)) | eval duree_heures = round((fin_timestamp - debut_timestamp) / 3600, 1) | eval coords = lat . ", " . lon | eval temps_avant = round((debut_timestamp - now()) / 3600, 1) | table debut_prevu fin_prevue municipalite adresse clients cause duree_heures temps_avant coords | rename debut_prevu as "Début prévu", fin_prevue as "Fin prévue", municipalite as "Municipalité", adresse as "Adresse", clients as "Clients", cause as "Cause", duree_heures as "Durée (h)", temps_avant as "Dans (h)", coords as "Coordonnées" | sort "Dans (h)"

panel.title: Toutes les interruptions planifiées à venir

search.query: index=hydroquebec sourcetype=hydroquebec:interruption_planifie region="$region_filter$" municipalite="$municipalite_filter$" | stats latest(aip_timestamp) as derniere_collecte, latest(municipalite) as municipalite, latest(adresse) as adresse, latest(nombre_clients) as clients, latest(date_debut_prevue) as debut_prevu, latest(date_fin_prevue) as fin_prevue, latest(cause_desc) as cause, latest(statut) as statut by id_interruption | where derniere_collecte > relative_time(now(), "-2h") | eval debut_timestamp = strptime(debut_prevu, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval fin_timestamp = strptime(fin_prevue, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | where debut_timestamp > now() | eval duree_heures = round((fin_timestamp - debut_timestamp) / 3600, 1) | table debut_prevu fin_prevue municipalite adresse clients cause statut duree_heures | rename debut_prevu as "Début prévu", fin_prevue as "Fin prévue", municipalite as "Municipalité", adresse as "Adresse", clients as "Clients", cause as "Cause", statut as "Statut", duree_heures as "Durée (h)" | sort "Début prévu"
